title: Durabaculum violaceoflavens
intro: There is no information available on a plant called Durabaculum violaceoflavens. However, I found a plant called Durio or Durio zibethinus is not related to this and Durio is a fruit and not an herbal plant.
taxonomy: Durabaculum violaceoflavens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as the polypody ferns. This plant is native to China and is a member of the genus Durabaculum. Durabaculum violaceoflavens is a rare species of fern that is recognized by its distinctive purple and yellow coloration. The classification of Durabaculum violaceoflavens reflects its unique characteristics and its relationship to other species within the Polypodiaceae family. Further research is needed to fully understand the classification and evolutionary history of this plant.
